title: alchemilla arvensis subsp. maroccana
intro: Alchemilla arvensis subsp. maroccana, also known as the lesser marshmallow, is a plant species that belongs to the Alchemilla genus. It is a perennial herb with a history of use in traditional medicine, where its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Alchemilla arvensis subsp. maroccana include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which can help in soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. This plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
